channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-12 03:00 → 2026-12-13 03:00 — Olivia Rodrigo at Oakland Arena. Olivia Rodrigo is a major pop sensation with a strong live reputation, making her shows highly anticipated.

item.title: Gracie Abrams @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-07 04:00 → 2026-12-08 04:00 — Gracie Abrams at Oakland Arena. Gracie Abrams is gaining buzz with her heartfelt pop music, and her tour is expected to draw significant attention.

item.title: Teddy Swims @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-11 03:00 — Teddy Swims at Chase Center. Teddy Swims is known for his powerful vocals and engaging live performances, making this tour a must-see.

item.title: The Mountain Goats @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-11-16 04:00 → 2026-11-22 04:00 — The Mountain Goats at The Fillmore. The Black Angels bring a captivating psychedelic rock experience that resonates well with live audiences.

item.title: John Summit @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-05 03:00 — John Summit at Oakland Arena. John Summit is a rising star in the electronic scene, known for his energetic sets that keep the crowd moving.

item.title: The Smashing Pumpkins @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-09 04:00 — The Smashing Pumpkins at SAP Center at San Jose. The Smashing Pumpkins continue to have a strong legacy and their upcoming tour is sure to attract nostalgic fans.

item.title: Mon Laferte @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-07 04:00 — Mon Laferte at SAP Center at San Jose. Mon Laferte is a celebrated artist with a strong live presence, making her Femme Fatale Tour noteworthy.

item.title: Hugel @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-11-08 02:00 — Hugel at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Hugel's event promises a lively atmosphere with a focus on dance music, appealing to electronic fans.

item.title: KATSEYE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-11-20 04:00 — KATSEYE at Oakland Arena. KATSEYE's tour is an intriguing mix of genres that could attract a diverse audience.

item.title: Straight No Chaser @ Palace of Fine Arts
item.description: 2026-11-18 03:30 — Straight No Chaser at Palace of Fine Arts. Straight No Chaser offers a unique a cappella experience, appealing to fans of vocal harmony.

item.title: Josh Garrels @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-11-05 03:00 — Josh Garrels at August Hall. Underoath's anniversary tour will resonate with long-time fans of the post-hardcore genre.

item.title: Fetty Wap @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-12-04 04:00 — Fetty Wap at The Masonic. Fetty Wap's nostalgia tour is likely to attract fans eager to relive his hits from the past.

item.title: Thee Sinseers @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-11-07 04:00 — Thee Sinseers at The Fillmore. Thee Sinseers' soulful sound is gaining traction, making their show a noteworthy event.
